race.comment: The penny has dropped for the well-related EVERYBODY RISE (1) (full to 2xG1 winner Russian Revolution) who has put back-to-back wins together to start the campaign and is racing high on confidence of late. Winning rider Marshall sticks in the saddle and can easily bring up the hat-trick against this lot. ADRANOS (2) also hails from a handy family (half to G2 winner Tiamo Grace) and has placed two from two around this circuit. Rarely puts in a poor one and has to be included in calculations. BOOYA BOY (5) strips fitter third run back and may feature with any luck in running from the wide draw. BALTRAY (3) next best with Wiggins as pilot.
